title: do an overall review of all the FAFO guild members playing Troubadour. Use all provided runs to give overall scorecard. Prioritize boon output > Damage Mitigation > Healing > Cleanses > Downs > Deaths. Do not factor in Strips

turns.agentText:

---

**Cavalier.4015 ranks as FAFO's top overall Troubadour** — S-tier Stability uptime (915%), A-tier Protection, top-quartile healing, and elite active mitigation. Here's the complete picture across all 29 tracked runs (Apr 24 – Jun 17, 2026), covering the Fafo-Agg + Fafo-June repos.

---

## FAFO Troubadour Scorecard

**Boon data** sourced from Jun 10 and Jun 17 (Fíbbs runs — most recent Troubadour appearances). All other metrics are aggregate across all available runs, normalized per combat hour. Strips excluded per request. ⚠ = stat includes non-Troubadour profession time. † = not on Troubadour in either sampled run.

Grades: **S** Elite · **A** Strong · **B** Solid · **C** Below Par · **D** Needs Work

---

| **Cavalier.4015** | 28⚠ | 915% | 129% | **S** | **S** (6,234) | **S** 2.69M | **A** 1,261 | B | A 5.7 | 🏅 **S** |
| **Voyl.5241** | 6⚠ | 944% | 158% | **S** | **B** (615) | C 1.23M⚠ | B 997⚠ | —⚠ | D 8.3⚠ | **A−** |
| **Seratrina.4319** | 19 | 780% (best) | 60% | **A** | **A** (3,869) | A 2.22M | C 833 | A 0.09M | C 7.8 | **B+** |
| **Stan.9684** | 17⚠ | 553% (best) | 76% | **B** | **C** (1,024) | S 2.78M | S 1,434 | B 0.06M | B 6.4 | **B+** |
| **WindNature.8496** | 26⚠ | 688% | 76% | **A** | **S** (5,600) | C 1.11M⚠ | C 900⚠ | B⚠ | B 6.6 | **B** |
| **Clarra.7236** | 21 | †N/A | †N/A | — | — | S 2.57M | S 1,303 | B 0.06M | B 6.8 | **B** *(partial)* |

---

### Newer Players *(≤5 runs, small sample)*

| Player | Runs | Healing/hr | Cleanses/hr | Deaths/hr | Verdict |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Yelenia Elegy.1320** | 5 | A 2.14M | S 1,307 | **S 4.5** | 🌟 Strongest debut of this group — all metrics above par |
| **DatBoiKevin.4630** | 5 | A 2.11M | B 1,077 | A 5.4 | Solid early showing |

| **Hassan Sabbah.1524** | 5 | D 0.73M | D 472 | C 7.3 | Below average across board; needs coaching on Troubadour sustain output |

---

## Key Findings

**🏆 Top Performers**
- **Cavalier** is the unambiguous #1 — S-tier boons on Troubadour days, best personal active mitigation in the roster (6,234 combined on Jun 10), and S-tier healing. The anchor of the Troubadour roster.
- **Voyl** has S-tier boon production as a relatively recent convert — already the highest Stability uptime in the Jun 17 sample (944%). Their aggregate healing/cleanses/deaths look low but those stats are polluted by prior Tempest time. Watch this player — they're producing.
- **Aeri and undiee** also produced A+ boon output in their first sampled Troubadour runs. Encouraging.

**🔧 Solid Core**
- **Seratrina** is your most reliable all-around Troubadour main — A boons, A mitigation, A healing — but cleanses (833/hr) are notably below the squad standard (~1,100–1,300/hr). This is the most actionable coaching point for an otherwise strong player.
- **Stan** is the #1 healer and cleanser per hour among confirmed active Troubadours — but boon uptime is only B tier (553% Stability best). They should be pushing for 700%+.
- **WindNature** produces excellent active mitigation (S-tier, 5,600 Jun 10) and solid boons but their healing/cleanses look weak — partially explained by non-Troubadour run time (Scourge, Reaper). Likely better than aggregate stats suggest when purely on Troubadour.
- **Clarra** has top-shelf healing (2.57M/hr) and cleanses (1,303/hr) but was absent from both boon-sampled runs. Need a Clarra-as-Troubadour boon check in the next run.

**🚨 Concern Flags**

| Player | Issue |
|---|---|
| **Zikum.4126** | Critical underperformance — **Stability at 82–156% uptime** (floor expectation is ~300–400%) across BOTH sampled runs. Mitigation near zero in Jun 17 (14 total blocks/evades/dodges). Either AFK, build issue, or not engaging in combat. 15 runs in and this pattern is consistent. Needs direct coaching. |
| **hotep.8715** | Boons are decent (B tier) but **healing at 0.76M/hr and cleanses at 337/hr are the lowest on the roster** by a wide margin among players with 5+ runs. The sustain output of a Troubadour is almost absent. Build review warranted. |
| **Hassan Sabbah.1524** | Across 5 runs, all support output metrics (healing 0.73M/hr, cleanses 472/hr) are at the floor. Early data but needs a build/skill check before further development is assumed. |

**📊 Notes on Switched Players**
Mes, woahs, Tysun, and Astronauta all left behind solid-to-strong Troubadour track records — especially Tysun (S-tier boons, Jun 10) and Mes (consistent S cleanses). If the guild ever needs to flex back, these four have the institutional knowledge.
